summary: Re-ran the 5 previously-blocked frontend flows after main agent added the new data-testids. All 5 PASS end-to-end: catalog brand filter (filter-brand-Nike/All/Air Jordan all found, URL updates to ?brand=Nike), product size selection (6 size-btn-* found, size-btn-8 clickable & highlights), Buy Now opens cart drawer (not checkout), cart qty inc/dec testids present & functional, full checkout form fills via checkout-name/email/phone/address/city and submit returns checkout-success with order_number OS20260518042969 (starts with 'OS').

issues: Console warning: 'Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent'. Add <SheetDescription> or aria-describedby to silence Radix a11y warning.

action_items: (Optional) Add SheetDescription/aria-describedby to CartDrawer SheetContent to silence Radix accessibility console warning.
critical_code_review_comments: OrderCreate still trusts client-supplied `total` — recompute server-side from items*price for tamper-resistance (carried over from iter 1, low priority since mock).
server.py @app.on_event deprecation still present — migrate to lifespan (carried over).
seed_data_creation: Used auto-seeded data; created 1 test order OS20260518042969 via mock POST /api/orders.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All flagged testids confirmed working: filter-brand-{Brand} (incl. 'Air Jordan' with space), size-btn-{size}, cart-qty-inc/dec-{product_id}, checkout-{name|email|phone|address|city|country}, checkout-success, checkout-success-order-number. Buy Now correctly opens cart drawer with item, then cart-checkout-btn reveals the form. Order numbers prefix 'OS' as required.
rca of the issue: N/A — no defects in this iteration.
